tooltip.moreswordsmod.iron_katana.flavor: A disciplined blade that rewards patience over panic.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.iron_katana.abilit: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward with bonus damage.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.gold_katana.flavor: Swift, light, and merciless in practiced hands.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.gold_katana.abilit: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward with bonus damage.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.diamond_katana.fla: A duelist's weapon that weakens those who fail to keep up.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.diamond_katana.abi: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward and may inflict Weakness.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.netherite_katana.f: A flawless killing edge forged for relentless precision.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.netherite_katana.a: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward and may inflict Weakness.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.lightning_staff.fl: Lightning coils around the staff with every marked foe.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.lightning_staff.ab: Consecutive hits on the same target build charge.
At 5 stacks, lightning discharges and chains to nearby mobs.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.wind_staff.flavor: A roaming gale bound into a staff of impossible lightness.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.wind_staff.ability: Right-click to burst in your aim direction.
Held in either hand, glide slows falls and cancels drop damage.
Direct hits launch targets and inflict Levitation briefly.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.flavor: A grim reaper's hook that favors heavy, deliberate cuts.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.abilit: Fully charged hits inflict Wither for a short duration.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.obsidian_greatswor: A slab of volcanic ruin built to break lines and bones alike.
Heavy swings also punch through half of a target's armor.
